content:
The Rust Microconference for the Linux Plumbers Conference 2024 has been accepted!

  • https://lpc.events/event/18/sessions/186/

Proposals can be submitted now at:

  • https://lpc.events/event/18/abstracts/

More details in the blog post:

  • https://lpc.events/blog/current/index.php/2024/05/03/awesome-amount-of-microconference-submissions/

The CFP deadlines for MCs are now being announced. For the Rust MC, the CFP closes on July 14th.

https://lpc.events/event/18/contributions/1662/

If you have any trouble submitting your proposal(s), please let us know.

Reminder: there is less than a week left for sending proposals to the Rust MC.

Blog post: https://lpc.events/blog/current/index.php/2024/07/07/rust-microconference-cfp/
